# Project Overview
*Auto-generated by Unravel on 2026-04-04. Edit the "## Notes" section — it is never overwritten.*

## Architecture
**Language(s):** JavaScript
**Scale:** 25 files indexed · 311 relationships mapped · 309 total KG nodes

## Key Files (by connectivity)
- **core/ast-engine-ts.js** (61 connections)  [request-handler, knowledge-graph, ast-analysis]
  Initialize the tree-sitter WASM parser. Must be called (and awaited) before any parseCode() calls. Safe to call multiple times — no-ops after first. — AST analysis engine. 58 detector/parser functions
- **core/orchestrate.js** (29 connections)  [orchestration, core-orchestrate]
  Extract filename references from a text string. Module-level version — safe to call from Phase 5.6 outside verifyClaims. — Diagnostic pipeline. Runs the multi-phase analysis protocol. 18 functions.
- **index.js** (29 connections)  [entry-point, knowledge-graph, search]
  Convert a file path to a file:// URL for ESM dynamic import (Windows safe) — Knowledge graph construction and management. 27 functions.
- **core/embedding-browser.js** (22 connections)  [embeddings, knowledge-graph, search]
  Embed a single text string using Gemini Embedding 2 Preview. — Semantic layer: embeddings + search. Key: embedText, embedImage, fuseEmbeddings, buildSemanticScoresFromVec.
- **core/sidebar-ref.js** (22 connections)  [embeddings, knowledge-graph, formatting]
  Show the full Unravel report in a WebView sidebar panel. — Knowledge graph construction and management. 22 functions.
- **embedding.js** (18 connections)  [embeddings, knowledge-graph, search]
  Embed a single text string using Gemini Embedding 2 Preview. Use RETRIEVAL_DOCUMENT for KG nodes (indexing), RETRIEVAL_QUERY for symptoms (search). CO — Semantic layer: embeddings + search. Key: embed
- **core/ast-bridge-browser.js** (15 connections)  [knowledge-graph, ast-analysis, core-ast-bridge-browser]
  Extract intra-file function calls — used to build cross-file call edges in the KG. Walks the AST tracking the enclosing function name. When it finds a — AST analysis engine. 14 detector/parser functio
- **core/config.js** (15 connections)  [request-handler, orchestration, formatting]
  Deterministic error-type classifier — no LLM cost. Returns one of: 'PACKAGE_RESOLUTION' | 'BUILD_CONFIG' | 'RUNTIME_TYPE' | 'RUNTIME_LOGIC' Currently  — Diagnostic pipeline. Runs the multi-phase analy
- **core/graph-storage.js** (15 connections)  [knowledge-graph, core-graph-storage]
  Compute SHA-256 hex hash of a string. Uses Node.js crypto (sync) when available (VS Code / indexer). Falls back to FNV-1a 32-bit in browser where _req — Knowledge graph construction and management. 13
- **core/ast-project.js** (13 connections)  [knowledge-graph, ast-analysis, formatting]
  When provided, initParser() (WASM) is NOT called. The fn must have the same signature as parseCode(code, filename) and return a tree-sitter tree. — AST analysis engine. 10 detector/parser functions.
- **core/ast-bridge.js** (12 connections)  [ast-analysis, core-ast-bridge]
  Attach structuralAnalysis to each file object. Pure-JS regex — no WASM, no Node.js APIs. Works in all environments. — AST analysis engine. 10 detector/parser functions.
- **core/indexer.js** (12 connections)  [knowledge-graph, ast-analysis, core-indexer]
  Analyze a single file via LLM. Falls back to empty metadata if the call fails. Bug #1 fix: callProvider takes a FLAT options object, not (messages[],  — Knowledge graph construction and management. 6
